analysis.reasoning: Core message: China announces its election to the UN Human Rights Council (2021-2023) and pledges to play an active, constructive role in protecting and promoting human rights. Evaluation: CH1 (West immoral/hostile) – Not present; no mention of the West or criticism. CH2 (China is a benevolent power) – Yes; emphasizes constructive, active role in a UN body to protect and promote human rights, aligning with cooperative, multilateral, pro-international order framing. CH3 (epic history) – Not referenced. CH4 (appropriate political system/values, domestically) – Not addressed; focus is international role, not domestic system or values. CH5 (CCP government succeeds) – Implicit prestige, but no explicit claim of domestic success or leadership; the tweet is about an international seat and role, so not applicable. CH6 (culture/nature/heritage) – Not relevant. Conclusion: The tweet promotes CH2.
